items.title: Concerns for competency of elderly woman rescued in WA outback then arrested
items.summary: Concerns have been raised about the competency of an elderly Indigenous woman facing a charge of unlawful wounding from 2024, after she was rescued and then arrested by police in Western Australia's outback this week.

items.title: World Health Organization warns hantavirus cases could rise as efforts intensify to prevent spread

items.title: Ted Turner's infamous feud with Rupert Murdoch began in a Hobart boathouse
items.summary: The two media moguls shared a bitter rivalry for decades after some drunken comments at a Hobart boathouse. Here's how their rivalry unfolded through the years.

items.title: Townsville Hospital doctors write to premier demanding cultural change

items.summary: The Dolphins recover from a rough start to hand the Bulldogs a fourth straight loss as coach Cameron Ciraldo bemoans decisions made by his players and the referees.

items.title: Kumanjayi Little Baby remembered at vigils across the country

items.title: Brisbane Lions player Koby Evans gets four-week ban for homophobic slur
items.summary: Brisbane Lions player Koby Evans is banned for four games after being found guilty of conduct unbecoming for using a homophobic slur against an opponent in the VFL.

items.title: NSW woman seeks damages from health district over amputated lower leg
items.summary: The woman says her leg was amputated despite it being "salvageable", but doctors argue the amputation was necessary to save her life.

items.summary: Clare Glade-Wright unseats fellow independent Dean Harriss in the southern Tasmanian upper house seat of Huon.

items.title: Federal government commits $5.9 million to illicit tobacco reform in the Northern Territory

items.title: Liberals and One Nation scuffle, Albanese tries ACDC diplomacy
items.summary: The heat is on in Farrer ahead of Saturday's by-election while in Canberra the prime minister has gone above and beyond with a gift for Japan's leader.

items.title: Adelaide Crows to feed off returning skipper Jordan Dawson's energy

items.title: Solomon Islands to get new leader after Jeremiah Manele voted out as prime minister

items.title: India's Narendra Modi emerges stronger after West Bengal win, vowing development and stability
